vision_report.temporal_deltas: Over the 5-day sequence, there is zero observable growth or change in the soil surface. The biome is in a state of stasis or total senescence.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All registered plants are either dead, buried, or missing. The environment appears to be a 'failed' or 'dormant' setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The white rabbit anchor is the only consistent biological/structural marker remaining. The lack of any green biomass suggests a complete collapse of the botanical registry.
vision_report.narrative_description: As an expert ethologist, I have performed a frame-by-frame audit of the provided sequence. The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the visual reality of the desk. The pots are present, but they are devoid of the expected flora. The soil appears dark and undisturbed throughout the 5-day observation window. The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only identifiable object of interest. There is no evidence of life, growth, or decay progression because the specimens are already absent or fully necrotic.
